should_trigger.prompt: Use Clara to organize this succession case, capture advisor judgement, and produce a decision pack.
I pasted consultant notes; structure them as pending judgement and keep the case materials organized.
Build a decision-maker-ready decision pack using only advisor judgement marked ready for the client pack and open questions.
Use Clara Voice Capture to transcribe a consultant discussion and save pending candidates for review.
Prepare a 15-minute hosted research interview link in French for an external stakeholder, then retrieve its bundle and quality review when complete.
Transcribe this meeting recording, complete local speaker attribution, and import the reviewed transcript into the existing case.
Revise this existing PPTX from the attached call transcript, preserve untouched slides, show me the interpreted changes for approval, then render and verify the corrected copy.
Clara, record feedback on this deck, open the capture for me, and import it when I finish.

Use Clara to map product attributes for this retailer and category from the current database snapshot, compare the retailer-defined new products with the rest of the assortment, create the private local HTML report, and tell me whether it is correct.
Use Clara to scrape this retailer and category locally, map the products to the central taxonomy, compare best sellers with the other products, and produce a checked HTML attribute report.

Use Clara Brand Fit with this completed Retailer Signals analysis. Compare those retailer signals with KIKO's current presence at Ulta and KIKO's owned catalogue, create a private local HTML report, and tell me whether it is correct.

Compare the checked retailer signals with this brand's current retailer presence and owned catalogue from the stored database snapshot. Keep images and the Brand Fit report local and do not claim this is a live shelf check.
Use Clara to analyze this spreadsheet, choose the most useful chart from the business question and actual fields, render it, and explain the result.
Use Clara to inspect the chart-selection manifest, profile this dataset into chart roles, and tell me which chart capabilities are mechanically compatible before semantic selection.
Use Clara to create and validate a source-backed semantic layer for this dataset before any chart is selected.

Use Clara to create a readable sidecar that maps each PPTX slide claim to its source, calculation, prior-slide claim, reasoning, assumption, or ungrounded status without adding visible citations to the deck.

Use Clara to beautify this final editable PPTX with Image2 into a non-editable image PDF, check each slide twice for identical content, regenerate failed pages, and send only the editable PPTX plus the beautified PDF.
Turn this approved Word document into a distinctive self-contained animated HTML presentation with speaker notes and a difficult publication URL.
Use Clara to create a source-faithful fixed 16:9 browser deck from this report, with semantic motion, fullscreen navigation, and browser QA.
Revise this existing Clara HTML deck from the approved change notes, preserve every untouched slide and protected component, and prove the before/after fidelity.

should_not_trigger.prompt: Compare these journal entries with supporting invoices and mark mismatches.
Optimize this tax question into a Deep Research prompt with legal source domains.
